rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 5, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Continued to May 7, 2014 to be heard with other pending motion.
